displayTitle: Poe Dameron Vol. 2: The Gathering Storm
synopsis: Picking up where Poe Dameron Volume I: Black Squadron leaves off, this next installment collects Issues 8-13 of Charles Soule's Marvel Comics series. Terex continues to hunt Black Squadron, and Poe is forced to wonder just how it is his nemesis always knows their next move. But first, he and C-3PO have an important mission assigned by none other than General Leia Organa.
title: Poe Dameron Vol. 2: The Gathering Storm
